name: Anycubic Kobra S1 Max 0.25 nozzle
default_filament_profile: Anycubic PLA @Anycubic Kobra S1 Max 0.25 nozzle
before_layer_change_gcode:
{if layer_num==0} ; PURGE LINE
M204 P500
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT SQUARE_CORNER_VELOCITY=9
G1 Z0.75 F900 ; for object exclusion
G1 X135 Y352 F18000
G1 Z.25 F900
G1 E0.8 F2400
G1 E0.6 F2400
G1 F3000
G1 X205 Y352 E3.72454
G1 X205 Y352.45 E.0252
G1 X135 Y352.45 E3.72454
G1 X135 Y352.02 E.02305
G1 Z0.5 F600
{endif}
change_filament_gcode:
; FLUSH_START
;@2026-04-03 S1M
;;; M400 P0
;_GP_INLINE_ESTIMATED_PRINTING_TIME_PLACEHOLDER
{local flush_length_= flush_length}
{local loops_=max(1,int((flush_length_+89.9) / 90))}
{local extrude_length_=flush_length_ / loops_}
{local time_flush_=int(extrude_length_ * loops_ * 300)}
;;; M400 P{time_flush_} ; ={flush_length_}*300

machine_end_gcode:
M400
M140 S0 ; turn off heatbed
M104 S0 ; turn off temperature
M141 S0 ; turn off box temperature
M106 P1 S0 ; turn off fan
M106 P2 S0
M106 P3 S0
M84; disable motors                  
; disable stepper motors
